text.title: content-audit Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for content-audit as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Incomplete inventory — missing PDFs, gated content, JavaScript-rendered pages.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An audit of 70% of content produces decisions that may conflict with unreviewed items; the inventory must be complete before scoring begins.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Content decays continuously; a single audit snapshot becomes stale within months without a review schedule and owner assignments.

failure-mode.description: All-or-nothing approach — auditing the entire site before taking any action.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Large audits stall on completion anxiety; start with priority areas (core pages, high-traffic content) to generate early wins.
